Title: Login with valid credentials
Steps:
1.Open login page
2.Enter username: standard_user
3.Enter password: secret_sauce
4. Click "Login"
Expected result:
User is successfully logged in
- User is redirected to the Products page
- Products list is displayed

Title: Login with invalid credentials
Steps:
1.Open login page
2. Enter username: standard_user
3. Enter invalid password
4. Click "Login"

Title: Login with empty field
Steps:
1.Open login page
2.Leave username empty
3.Leave password empty
4.Click "Login"

Title: Add products to cart
Steps:
1.Open login page
2.Login with valid credentials (standard_user / secret_sauce)
3.Navigate to Products page
4. Click "Add to cart" button for a product (e.g. Sauce Labs Backpack)

Title: Successfull checkout
Steps:
1.Add product to cart
2.Open cart
3.Click Checkout
4.Enter valid info
5.Click Continue
6.Click Finish
Expected result:
Order is completed
Confirmation message is shown
